note: Verified against source code by Codex read-only audit pass

SOURCE_NOTES.Panda Gallery: Dispatch named panda_gallery/, but this checkout exposes the main app as top-level Python modules. Codex audited the top-level Panda Gallery modules.
SOURCE_NOTES.PG Design Ledger: Audited panda_ledger/. Reference panel findings are warnings because the file carries an explicit pg-lint:disable-file note for Bible reference rendering.
SOURCE_NOTES.Relay Wizard: panda_relay/ was not found. A relay/ tree exists, but the dispatched source path is absent; no Relay Wizard entries were added in this pass.
SOURCE_NOTES.PANDA Vellum: panda_vellum/ was not found; source not implemented at the dispatched path.
SOURCE_NOTES.PANDA Collaborator: panda_collab/ was not found; source not implemented at the dispatched path.

Panda Gallery.description: The Save Changes dialog exposes two destructive/commit-like choices plus Save in one button row, with Save styled as the primary action while Don't Save shares the same row prominence.
Panda Gallery.bibleRef: §10 #4: More than one primary button per screen is not allowed; one clear primary action only.
Panda Gallery.ccAction: Demote Don't Save to the destructive/secondary treatment and leave Save as the only primary action in the dialog.
Panda Gallery.codexNote: Verified in dialogs.py button row: Cancel, Don't Save, and Save are presented together; Save has the accent primary style.

Clip Launcher.description: Clip Launcher defines menu and editor QSS with hardcoded color literals instead of shared Bible tokens.
Clip Launcher.bibleRef: §2.9: No hardcoded color literals in QSS strings; route colors through named tokens.
Clip Launcher.ccAction: Replace literal colors with shared Bible token constants or a local token map that mirrors the canonical token names.

Audit Module.description: Audit Module header action buttons are fixed at 24px tall, below the Bible standard button height.
Audit Module.bibleRef: §6.12: Standard buttons use the required 28px height and approved button hierarchy.
Audit Module.ccAction: Raise header action buttons from 24px to the approved 28px button height and adjust padding to preserve alignment.
Audit Module.codexNote: Verified setFixedHeight(24) plus QSS height: 24px in ActionHeader._make_action.

Bible Applets.description: AM UX Review applet primary and disabled CTA buttons are styled at 36px tall instead of the Bible standard 28px button height.
Bible Applets.bibleRef: §6.12: Standard buttons use the required 28px height and approved button hierarchy.
Bible Applets.ccAction: Set applet CTA button height to 28px and re-check surrounding spacing so the layout remains balanced.

Panda Gallery.description: Comparison Mode top bar uses inline QSS color literals for the bar, title, and Add Image button.
Panda Gallery.bibleRef: §2.9: No hardcoded color literals in QSS strings; route colors through named tokens.
Panda Gallery.fixTarget: comparison_view.py — ComparisonView._build_ui top bar and Add Image button
Panda Gallery.ccAction: Move the comparison toolbar QSS colors to shared Bible tokens or named style helpers.

PG Design Ledger.description: Reference panel renders hardcoded color literals in inline QSS, but the file appears intentionally exempt as a Bible reference/palette surface.
PG Design Ledger.bibleRef: §2.9: No hardcoded color literals in QSS strings; route colors through named tokens.
PG Design Ledger.ccAction: Confirm whether the reference panel exemption remains valid; if not, replace decorative QSS literals with token helpers.
PG Design Ledger.codexNote: File begins with pg-lint:disable-file for intentional Bible reference rendering, so Codex classified this as WARN instead of FAIL.

Audit Module.description: Audit Module action text uses an off-scale 11.5px font size in action buttons.
Audit Module.bibleRef: §3.3: Section/action text must use approved size, weight, spacing, and transform values.
Audit Module.ccAction: Round the action button font size to the closest approved Bible scale value and verify visual density.

Bible Applets.description: PAH simple applet mockup label uses 18px text, which appears off the compact Bible UI type scale.
Bible Applets.bibleRef: §3.3: Section/action text must use approved size, weight, spacing, and transform values.
Bible Applets.ccAction: Move the mockup label to the nearest approved type token or document why the mockup requires an exception.
